files.note: RangeSelectGridAllProps<TData, TCell> appended (already done in pre-context)
Added @tanstack/react-virtual optional peerDep (C-22 compliance, D3 spec defect)

specCodeDefects.defect: useCellRange called with options object {rowCount, colCount, onRangeChange, disabled} — actual hook signature is useCellRange(onRangeChange?: callback) with single optional callback argument
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Called as useCellRange(enableRangeSelection ? onRangeChange : undefined) matching actual useCellRange.ts signature. Mouse event gating done at component level via enableRangeSelection check in onMouseDown/onMouseEnter handlers.

specCodeDefects.defect: DragFillHandle render shows getCellValue={getCellValue ?? (() => undefined)} but DragFillHandleProps.getCellValue is non-optional — type would error with fallback
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Render condition changed to: enableDragFill && range !== null && getCellValue !== undefined. No fallback — getCellValue undefined → DragFillHandle not rendered (EC-001 behavior).

specCodeDefects.specLocation: G-006-spec.md Section 3.2 L214-225 getCellRect + implicit data-row/col requirement
specCodeDefects.defect: getCellRect uses querySelector('[data-row]...[data-col]...') but existing RangeSelectGrid.tsx (G-001 implementation) does not emit data-row/data-col attributes on <td> elements
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Added data-row={rowIdx} data-col={colIdx} attributes to all <td> elements in renderCells helper (Section 5.1 spec tree shows tr[data-row=r] + td[data-row=r][data-col=c]).

specCodeDefects.defect: useVirtualizer called with enabled: enableVirtualization option — @tanstack/react-virtual v3 does not have an 'enabled' option in useVirtualizer
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Used count: enableVirtualization ? rowCount : 0 to disable virtualization (count=0 produces empty virtualRows). 'enabled' option removed.

promptSpecDrift.specValue: C-22: peerDependencies required for @tanstack/react-virtual (used via import in RangeSelectGrid.tsx). Section 9 risk table notes 'C-22 정책 검토 필요 — implementer 판단'
promptSpecDrift.resolution: C-22 constraint applied — @tanstack/react-virtual added as optional peerDep. D3 interpreted as 'no license/EULA change needed' (the intent), not 'no peerDep addition allowed'.

New: data-row/col attrs, tabIndex/onKeyDown on container, 5 hook calls, DragFillHandle conditional render, virtualization render branch.

feedback.summary: G-006 capstone implemented: 7 spec files + package.json (C-22). tsc 0 errors (both packages). tsup build 14.22 KB ESM / 5.32 KB gzipped. 4 spec code defects found and corrected. 1 prompt-spec drift (D3 vs C-22 peerDep) resolved per C-22.
feedback.drift: 1 prompt-spec drift: D3 'package.json unchanged' vs C-22 peerDep obligation for @tanstack/react-virtual. Resolved per C-22 constraint (optional peerDep added).
feedback.defects: 4 spec code defects auto-corrected: (1) useCellRange signature HIGH, (2) DragFillHandle getCellValue MEDIUM, (3) data-row/col missing MEDIUM, (4) useVirtualizer 'enabled' option MEDIUM. All documented in specCodeDefects[].
items: spec L228-233 useCellRange({rowCount,colCount,...}) 시그니처 불일치 자율 정정 — 실제 useCellRange(callback?) 단일 인자 시그니처 사용.
spec L388-390 DragFillHandle getCellValue fallback 타입 오류 자율 정정 — getCellValue !== undefined 렌더 조건 사용.
spec getCellRect querySelector data-row/col attribute 누락 자율 정정 — <td data-row={rowIdx} data-col={colIdx}> 추가.
spec useVirtualizer enabled 옵션 미존재 자율 정정 — count: enableVirtualization ? rowCount : 0 사용.
D5 Rules of Hooks 준수: 5개 hook 전부 무조건 호출. DragFillHandle은 컴포넌트이므로 조건부 렌더 허용.
D9 onKeyDown 합성 체인 editKeyDown → navKeyDown → clipKeyDown (e.defaultPrevented early return 포함).
C-29 spread-skip 패턴: getCellValue, onPaste, onClipboardError, onDeleteRange, onBulkEdit, onEditStart, onFillComplete, onFillTargetChange 모두 spread-skip.
useVirtualizer 가상화: count=0 (enableVirtualization=false) → virtualRows=null → 일반 tbody rows.map() 렌더 fallback.
noop function type: CellRange | null (not CellCoord | null) — fixed tsc error in useKeyboardNav onRangeChange parameter.
tsup.config.ts minify:true preserved from G-004 loop 2 — not re-touched per C-1 surgical changes.
